debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G C : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
hC : C.IsCycleGraph
hCG : C ≤ @Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM'
⊢ Disjoint (C.edgeSet ∩ M) (C.edgeSet ∩ M')

failed_attempts:
rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
  intro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, _, heM'⟩
  have heSD : e ∈ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := hCG.edge_subset heC
  simp only [restrict₂, edgeSet_loopRemove, edgeSet_restrict, mem_inter_iff, mem_symmDiff] at heSD
  exact heSD.1.elim (fun h => h.2 heM') (fun h => h.2 heM)

rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
  intro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, _, heM'⟩
  have heG : e ∈ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := hCG.2 heC
  simp only [restrict₂, edgeSet_restrict, edgeSet_loopRemove, mem_diff, mem_inter_iff] at heG
  exact heG.1.2 ⟨heM, heM'⟩

rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
  intro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨_, heM'⟩⟩
  have hne : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    have := hCG.2 heC
    simp only [restrict₂, edgeSet_restrict, edgeSet_loopRemove] at this
    exact this.1
  simp only [symmDiff_def, mem_union, mem_diff] at hne
  rcases hne with ⟨_, hne⟩ | ⟨_, hne⟩ <;> contradiction

rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
  intro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, _, heM'⟩

    Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at heSD
  exact heSD.1.2 ⟨heM, heM'⟩
